summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CLARITY Executive Coaching Dashboard. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend-backend integration working perfectly. All core features tested including admin/participant roles, 10-session tracking, resource management, scheduling, and community features.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation links not clickable via text selectors in Playwright - require direct URL navigation or alternative selectors

passed_tests: Admin login with httpOnly cookies authentication
Admin dashboard stats display (participants, completion rate, pending requests, resources)
Participant creation and management via API
Schedule request system (participant request, admin approval)
Community feed with post creation and like functionality
Resource management endpoints and 6 resource types
Role-based access control (participants blocked from admin routes)
Participant login and dashboard with progress tracking
Participant access to Resources, Schedule, and Community pages
Auth security (brute force protection, invalid login handling)
